description: Fix a concurrency bug in transition_to of ProcessStateMachine in state_machine.py. The transition validation and state update must be atomic and synchronized. Currently, if Thread A begins transitioning INIT -> PENDING and Thread B attempts to transition PENDING -> PROCESSING immediately after, Thread B reads the state before Thread A completes its update, raising a ValueError. Guard the entire transition block with self._lock to ensure thread safety. Run the tests to verify.
